title: tagetes rupestris
intro: Tagetes rupestris, also known as mountain marigold, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family. It has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever and relieving digestive issues. Tagetes rupestris is typically prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
